summary: Great show with excellent sound quality captured by the taper
review: Both reviewers praise this performance as a great show and highlight the high‑quality taping and mastering, calling the sound crisp and enjoyable. No specific songs or performance issues are mentioned, indicating an overall positive listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews give 4 stars and focus on strong show energy and excellent sound quality; lack of detailed song or performance commentary limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note great/nice sound, praising the taper's work and mastering; no issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers simply describe the overall show as great.
